local_results.title: The Fitness Factory
local_results.description: Locally owned fitness center open 24 hours with a high ceiling, free weights, and machines.
local_results.user_review: "The price is very cheap and you get a great amount of equipment to use."

local_results.title: Workout Anytime Portland Downtown
local_results.description: Chain gym providing 24-hour access to cardio and weight machines, tanning, and HydroMassage.
local_results.user_review: "Very cheap, excellent equipment, and very clean and well kept."

local_results.title: Beacon Community Fitness
local_results.description: Well-kept, clean gym offering an array of CrossFit classes including boot camps and postpartum fitness classes.
local_results.user_review: "A wide range of options for all levels to meet their fitness goals."

local_results.title: Snap Fitness South Portland
local_results.description: Gym featuring cardio machines, free weights and personal training, alongside friendly staff and a stretch room.
local_results.user_review: "There are also protein bars and drinks offered for sale."

local_results.title: Planet Fitness
local_results.description: Chain gym providing equipment for strength and cardio workouts, as well as tanning.
local_results.user_review: "The affordability of the membership is fair."

local_results.title: YMCA of Southern Maine - Portland Branch
local_results.description: Nonprofit center for classes & services. Community-focused nonprofit established in 1844 with recreational programs & services for all ages.
local_results.user_review: "One time visit was $12."

local_results.title: Dynamics Fitness
local_results.user_review: "10/10 would recommend!"

local_results.title: Misfit Gym Portland
local_results.description: Spacious, welcoming fitness center featuring CrossFit classes for beginners and experienced athletes alike.
local_results.user_review: "The focus is on form and function and every exercise has a scaled option."

local_results.title: NXGen Fitness Center
local_results.user_review: "Spacious, not jammed pack like sardines during rush hour and free towels."

local_results.title: Basics Fitness Center
local_results.user_review: "Nutrition classes, yoga, and dance instruction are available for a fee."

local_results.title: Shift Portland Training Center
local_results.description: Minimalist gym featuring personal training and a variety of classes, including yoga.
local_results.user_review: "10/10 reccomend."

local_results.title: Jacked and Jilled
local_results.description: Clean strength-training spot with powerlifting platforms and squat racks, plus personal trainers.
local_results.user_review: "Lots of machines, free weights, and barbells."

local_results.title: Back Cove Personal Fitness
local_results.description: Fitness center offering a continuum of personal trainers and physical therapists.
local_results.user_review: "I highly recommend Back Cove Personal Fitness!"

local_results.title: I Get Active
local_results.address: Inside Good Medicine Collective, 231 York St, Portland, ME 04104
local_results.user_review: "10/10 recommend."

local_results.title: CrossFit Casco Bay
local_results.description: Spacious gym for CrossFit with group classes, featuring encouraging coaches.
local_results.user_review: "The facility offers a number of great programs that fit your schedule."

local_results.title: Anytime Fitness
local_results.user_review: "Great gym, great equipment and amazing pricing!!"

local_results.title: Fitness Equipment Maine
local_results.description: Workout gear and weights store offering treadmills, ellipticals, exercise bikes and other equipment for homes, gyms and commercial spaces.
local_results.user_review: "It included a treadmill, elliptical, water rower, and a set of dumbbells."

local_results.title: EVO Rock + Fitness Portland
local_results.description: Well-equipped gym with tall indoor climbing walls, bouldering and yoga spaces.
local_results.user_review: "Great line climbing, including auto-belay systems."

local_results.title: F45 Training Downtown Portland
local_results.user_review: "I found it on ClassPass too and it was cheaper than most gyms I go to."

local_results.title: Planet Fitness
local_results.address: 198 Maine Mall Rd, South Portland, ME 04106
local_results.description: Affordable chain fitness center offering weight machines, treadmills and free weights in a clean facility.
local_results.user_review: "Place is great if you need a treadmill or basic calisthenics work."
